picks.rationale: TON shows exceptional momentum with +24.69% 1W, +24.23% 1D, +18.13% 1M returns, and YTD +7.47% despite a broad market downturn; 1Y return of +82% highlights strong relative strength.
XLM surged +30.51% in the past month and +49% over 1Y, with YTD only -1.43% showing resilience; news of MoneyGram's stablecoin launch and Kalshi altcoin futures filing are positive catalysts.
TRX is the strongest YTD performer at +15.36% with a 1Y return of +28%, and minimal 1D decline of -0.72% during a market rout; new gold-backed Visa card with 6% cashback adds positive narrative.

BNB shows relative strength with only -3.11% 1M loss versus peers deep in double-digit declines, and YTD -30.10% is less severe than many large-caps; its large market cap of £60.4B provides stability.
PEPE recently surged +4.21% driven by whale leveraged longs worth ~$4.62 million, remaining resilient as Bitcoin tumbled, and memecoin speculative interest persists despite flat headline data.
HBAR has +16% 1Y return and minimal -2.92% 1M decline, showcasing resilience; Kalshi filing for HBAR perpetual futures signals growing institutional interest, though weak YTD -25.48% is a concern.

Bitcoin offers a value entry near $63k amid broad selloff, with +6% 1Y return and positive news sentiment 0.093; ETF outflows and liquidation cascade are short-term drags but historically are buying opportunities.

Ethereum at £1,314 is cheap relative to historical levels with a large £159.3B market cap; although YTD -41.21% is severe, the broad market liquidation is creating a potential bottom-fishing opportunity.
ALGO has a +28% 1Y return and just debuted on Robinhood US, boosting retail accessibility; YTD -14.34% is moderate versus peers, though recent 1W -17.10% shows ongoing weakness.

DOT has a moderate 1M decline of -14.02% versus deeper losses in many altcoins, and Kalshi's altcoin futures filing adds potential speculative interest; YTD -47.09% makes it a high-risk contrarian pick.

previous_picks.rationale: XLM shows exceptional momentum with +59% 1-year return, +5.16% YTD and +37.12% 1-month gain; MoneyGram's new stablecoin launch directly boosts Stellar's payments narrative.
BNB is the only top-10 asset with positive 1-month (+4.80%) and 1-week (+1.57%%) momentum; combined with +13% 1-year gain and neutral news sentiment (0.0) it stands out as a relative safe haven.
TRX has +28% 1-year return and +16.01% YTD—the best YTD of any asset; positive news sentiment 0.098 with Securitize launching tokenized funds on TRON supports fundamentals.
ALGO returned +40% over the past year and has relatively mild drawdowns with -6.76% YTD; Robinhood US listing significantly increases retail accessibility and trading volumes.
LINK has a +14% 1-year return and £4.5B market cap; Kalshi filing for perpetual futures including LINK adds speculative interest despite -7.17% 1w pullback.
TON has strong +47% 1-year return despite -13.06% YTD and negative news sentiment -0.542; its cost-effective, fast transaction execution is gaining traction in emerging markets and gaming.
HBAR returned +18% over the past year; Kalshi filing for HBAR perpetual futures may attract speculative capital despite -24.27% YTD and neutral news sentiment 0.005.
PEPE is a high-beta meme with zero price changes YTD/1m/1w due to stale data; any fresh catalyst could trigger outsized moves given its nil market cap baseline.
SUI shows nil price history but has strong on-chain activity growth and developer VC backing; its innovative object-centric L1 design may lead to a rebound if market sentiment improves.
MATIC's price data is stale but news sentiment is positive at 0.118; Meta paying creators in stablecoins via Polygon signals real enterprise adoption potential.
